# MDLMeshBufferData

**Class**

A memory buffer that stores vertex or index data for a Model I/O mesh.

## Declaration

```swift
class MDLMeshBufferData
```

## Overview

This class is the simplest concrete implementation of the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMeshBuffer] protocol—use this class when you need only a single data store for loading or processing mesh data. To share mesh data for other uses, use another concrete implementation of the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMeshBuffer] protocol—for example, the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/MetalKit/MTKMeshBuffer] class shares mesh data with Metal buffers, ensuring that data is copied a minimal number of times between loading, processing, and rendering.If you do not specify a [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMeshBufferAllocator] object for loading meshes from a file with the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLAsset] class or generating meshes with the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMesh] class, Model I/O uses [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMeshBufferData] objects to store mesh data.

## Creating a Buffer

- **init(type:data:)**: Initializes a buffer containing the specified data.
- **init(type:length:)**: Initializes a buffer of the specified length.

## Accessing a Buffer’s Data

- **data**: The underlying data storage for the mesh buffer.

## Managing Mesh Data

- **MDLMeshBuffer**: The general interface for managing storage of vertex and index data used in loading, processing, and rendering meshes.
- **MDLMeshBufferAllocator**: The general interface for managing allocation of data buffers to be used in loading, processing, and rendering meshes.
- **MDLMeshBufferDataAllocator**: A basic allocator implementation that allocates from main memory using data objects.
- **MDLMeshBufferMap**: An object that manages access to a memory buffer used for the data storage of a Model I/O mesh.
- **MDLMeshBufferZone**: The general interface for logical pools of memory used in allocation of related mesh data buffers.
- **MDLMeshBufferZoneDefault**: A standard implementation of the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMeshBufferZone] protocol.
- **MDLVertexAttribute**: A description of the format of per-vertex data for a single vertex attribute in a mesh object.
- **MDLVertexAttributeData**: An object that provides convenience access to vertex data for a specific vertex attribute of a mesh.
- **MDLVertexBufferLayout**: A [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLVertexBufferLayout] object describes layout information for a vertex buffer in a [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMesh] object. A collection of vertex layer objects, vertex attribute objects, and additional information forms a [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLVertexDescriptor] object, which completely describes the layout of vertex buffers for a mesh.
- **MDLVertexDescriptor**: A description of the structure, format, and layout for vertex data buffers associated with a mesh.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- MDLMeshBuffer
- NSCopying
- NSObjectProtocol
